title: zeia repens
intro: Zeia repens, also known as creeping Jenny, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the clematis family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Zeia repens include reducing stress and anxiety, improving skin health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Zeia repens can be found in teas, tinctures, and salves, often used to promote relaxation and soothe skin irritations.
